model_data.sql:
WITH t0 AS (
  SELECT
    t4.payment_id AS payment_id,
    t4.order_id AS order_id,
    t4.payment_method AS payment_method,
    t4.amount AS amount,
    t4.amount_in_dollars AS amount_in_dollars,
    CASE
      WHEN (
        t4.payment_method = 'credit_card'
      )
      THEN t4.amount_in_dollars
      ELSE 0
    END AS credit_card_amount
  FROM dev.payments AS t4
), t1 AS (
  SELECT
    t0.payment_id AS payment_id,
    t0.order_id AS order_id,
    t0.payment_method AS payment_method,
    t0.amount AS amount,
    t0.amount_in_dollars AS amount_in_dollars,
    t0.credit_card_amount AS credit_card_amount,
    CASE WHEN (
      t0.payment_method = 'coupon'
    ) THEN t0.amount_in_dollars ELSE 0 END AS coupon_amount
  FROM t0
), t2 AS (
  SELECT
    t1.payment_id AS payment_id,
    t1.order_id AS order_id,
    t1.payment_method AS payment_method,
    t1.amount AS amount,
    t1.amount_in_dollars AS amount_in_dollars,
    t1.credit_card_amount AS credit_card_amount,
    t1.coupon_amount AS coupon_amount,
    CASE
      WHEN (
        t1.payment_method = 'bank_transfer'
      )
      THEN t1.amount_in_dollars
      ELSE 0
    END AS bank_transfer_amount
  FROM t1
)
SELECT
  t3.order_id,
  SUM(t3.credit_card_amount) AS credit_card_amount_total,
  SUM(t3.coupon_amount) AS coupon_total,
  SUM(t3.bank_transfer_amount) AS transaction_total,
  SUM(t3.gift_card_amount) AS gift_card_amount_total,
  SUM(t3.amount_in_dollars) AS total_amount_in_dollars
FROM (
  SELECT
    t2.payment_id AS payment_id,
    t2.order_id AS order_id,
    t2.payment_method AS payment_method,
    t2.amount AS amount,
    t2.amount_in_dollars AS amount_in_dollars,
    t2.credit_card_amount AS credit_card_amount,
    t2.coupon_amount AS coupon_amount,
    t2.bank_transfer_amount AS bank_transfer_amount,
    CASE
      WHEN (
        t2.payment_method = 'gift_card'
      )
      THEN t2.amount_in_dollars
      ELSE 0
    END AS gift_card_amount
  FROM t2
) AS t3
GROUP BY
  1
